label: Improved
items: When you click "Add to Shed" from a Plant Lens identification result, it now opens the same library-first search the "Find a plant" button on the Plants page uses — so you see plant library, Verdantly and Perenual results alongside any AI guide, instead of being auto-routed to an AI-only flow. The scientific name (when available) is used as the search seed for the most precise library match.
